entries.notes: Large 14-community account, active onboarding. Strong momentum (messaging 4x growth, zero agency usage, overtime reductions at West Jordan and Ogden) mixed with significant problem communities — Beaumont in particular is dragging multiple metrics. platformUsage.summary: 42.9% weighted average publish rate across 14 active facilities (Apr–May window). Sharp bifurcation: Layton (99%), Cedar City (98%), and Ogden (76%) are exemplary; Beaumont (22%), Whisper Cove (25%), and West Jordan (29%) are the lowest among live communities and are large enough to significantly drag the account average. Message volume grew from ~3K/month in Oct 2025 to ~13K in Mar 2026 — strong adoption signal. Fill rate is consistently low (~1%) but steady.

May reflect selective meeting logging rather than low engagement.
